conclusion: MPP must force CDR for code-bearing work because code quality, security, testing and recurrence prevention must be reviewed before acceptance.

sources.claim: Code review checks design, functionality, complexity, tests, naming, comments, style, documentation, every line and context.
SSDF recommends practices to reduce vulnerabilities, mitigate exploitation impact and address root causes to prevent recurrence.
OWASP checklist covers validation, access control, error handling/logging, data protection, file management, memory management and general coding practices.
